meta.maintenanceInstruction: KEEP THE PLAN UP TO DATE AS YOU EVOLVE THE CODE. DEVIATIONS TO THE PLAN MUST BE LOGGED WITHIN THE PLAN. THE PLAN MUST BE REASSESSED HOLISTICALLY AFTER ANY CHANGE OF ANY SIZE.
meta.completionPolicy: YOU ARE NOT DONE UNTIL YOU HAVE COMPLETED 100% OF THE BLUEPRINT. DO NOT STOP. YOU MUST REFINE AT REGULAR INTERVALS TO KEEP THE BLUEPRINT FULL. NEVER SPECIFY ANY ESTIMATE OF EFFORT OR COST — ESPECIALLY NOT TIME ESTIMATES. NEVER SPECIFY A PRIORITY OF ANY KIND.
replanLog: 2026-03-06: Hana directive via config.mk error. B01 ANSI stripping removed — root cause was incorrect direct ANSI usage instead of osm:lipgloss. All W-series (Wizard UI + termmux facade) feature work promoted to top of task list. Non-feature tasks (test coverage, code quality, docs, cross-platform) demoted to end. Feature work is THE priority.

globalAlerts.warning: CRITICAL LOCAL INTEGRATION REQUIREMENT: The agent is running on a machine that has the 'claude' CLI installed. You absolutely MUST run `make integration-test-prsplit` and other integration targets defined in `project.mk` during development. Standard checks like `make all` are insufficient on their own because they skip these tests.

HARD MANDATE (NO EXCEPTIONS): For EVERY bug/regression, you MUST (1) replicate with HIGH CONFIDENCE via a failing test, (2) validate that replication FAILS via make target, and ONLY THEN (3) apply a fix. No exceptions.
ANTI-HALLUCINATION CONSTRAINT: Do NOT invent root causes or describe nonexistent logic. If you have not read the relevant code paths, add an investigation task.
TOOLING REQUIREMENT: All verification MUST use the make-based workflow. Cross-platform checks MUST pass (make all). macOS-only integration tests via project.mk targets.
RULE OF TWO (COMMIT GATE): No commits until two contiguous, issue-free subagent strict reviews confirm correctness.
INDEFINITE CYCLE: The task list must never become empty. Always expand scope towards True Perfection.
FEATURE WORK FIRST: Wizard UI and termmux facade are the primary deliverables. Non-feature tasks (test coverage, docs, cleanup) come AFTER all W-series tasks.

mandatoryDirectives.contextManagement: Execute tasks strictly in sequence. Update blueprint.json incrementally after each task.
mandatoryDirectives.sourceOfTruth: Live chunks: internal/command/pr_split_00_core.js through pr_split_13_tui.js (14 IIFE-wrapped files). Go bridge: internal/command/pr_split.go (embeds + loads all chunks via loadChunkedScript). Tests: 46+ test files in internal/command/ matching pr_split_*_test.go and prsplit_*_test.go. Chunk test helper: loadChunkEngine() in pr_split_00_core_test.go (auto-injects t.TempDir runtime.dir). Full engine helpers: loadPrSplitEngine()/loadPrSplitEngineWithEval() in pr_split_test.go. TUI: prsplit_autosplit_model.go (AutoSplitModel), prsplit_plan_editor.go (PlanEditor). Design doc: docs/architecture-pr-split-chunks.md. ADR: docs/adr/001-pr-split-chunked-architecture.md.
mandatoryDirectives.fullEndToEndIntegrationTesting: The -integration flag, -claude-command, -claude-arg flags registered in internal/command/main_test.go TestMain. project.mk targets: integration-test-prsplit, integration-test-prsplit-mcp, integration-test-termmux. New test functions in internal/command/ matching TestIntegration_* are automatically picked up by make integration-test-prsplit-mcp.
mandatoryDirectives.chunkArchitecture: 14 JS chunk files loaded in order by pr_split.go (loadChunkedScript). Each chunk is an IIFE that attaches exports to globalThis.prSplit (initialized by chunk 00). Chunks may reference symbols from earlier chunks via globalThis.prSplit. Go-injected globals (autoSplitTUI, tuiMux, splitView, planEditorFactory, prSplitConfig) are available to all chunks.

statusSection.currentState: Build GREEN. All tests pass (make all). make integration-test-prsplit-mcp GREEN. 15 commands registered. 14 JS chunk files loaded sequentially. 46+ pr-split test files. Two bugs fixed (B00: git state mutation, B02: PR creation empty-diff guard). termmux facade: WrapMux (fe0d009), event subscription (b87f58a), BubbleTea integration via toggleModel+fromModel (53a6791). wip branch at 53a6791.
statusSection.goalState: Wizard UI fully implemented in JS via termmux facade. osm:termmux module exposes pane management, visibility, events, BubbleTea integration to JS. State machine drives Config→PlanGeneration→PlanReview→BranchBuilding→ErrorResolution→Finalization. Old Go TUI replaced. Integration tests expanded. Cross-platform validated. Every line has a reason to exist. No dead code. No AI slop.

sequentialTasks.task: T01: W00 - Study osm:bubbletea builtin API patterns
sequentialTasks.description: Read internal/builtin/bubbletea/. Document: Go-to-JS exposure, event handling, lifecycle, thread safety. Write findings to scratch/w00-api-study.md.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: scratch/w00-api-study.md exists with concrete API patterns: model factory, message handling, view rendering, tea.Cmd equivalents in JS.

sequentialTasks.task: T02: W00 - Study osm:bt builtin event patterns
sequentialTasks.description: Read internal/builtin/bt/. Document event-driven patterns, behavior tree integration, non-blocking JS interaction.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Event-driven patterns documented in scratch/w00-bt-termmux-study.md.

sequentialTasks.task: T03: W00 - Study internal/termmux for facade requirements
sequentialTasks.description: Read internal/termmux/. Document: public API, pane management, PTY integration, render pipeline, VTerm usage, status bar. Identify what needs JS bindings vs Go-only.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Termmux API fully documented in scratch/w00-bt-termmux-study.md. Public vs internal clearly distinguished.

sequentialTasks.task: T04: W00 - Design termmux JS facade API
sequentialTasks.description: Design JS API for osm:termmux in scratch/w00-termmux-facade-design.md. Include: pane CRUD, visibility, event subscription, BubbleTea integration, non-blocking patterns. Core termmux must NOT contain goja bindings.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: API design document complete with function signatures, event names, option types, error handling, and JS usage examples.

sequentialTasks.description: Create package: module.go, pane.go, events.go, integration.go. Wire in internal/builtin/register.go. Package must compile and register as 'osm:termmux'.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Package compiles. require('osm:termmux') from JS returns an object. make all passes.

sequentialTasks.task: T06: W00 - Migrate pr_split.go tuiMux to osm:termmux
sequentialTasks.description: Replaced the ad-hoc tuiMux global (80-line map[string]interface{}) in pr_split.go with termmuxmod.WrapMux(ctx, engine.Runtime(), tuiMux). Exported WrapMux from the module package. Removed duplicated attach/detach/switchToClaude/isClaudeActive/setStatus/setToggleKey/setStatusEnabled/setResizeFunc/screenshot wiring — all now provided by the module's standardized interface. Go-side autoSplitModel toggle callback still accesses *termmux.Mux directly (needed for BubbleTea integration). JS code continues using tuiMux global (backward-compatible) which is now a module-produced object.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: tuiMux global removed from pr_split.go. JS code uses require('osm:termmux'). make all passes. Integration tests pass.

sequentialTasks.task: T07: W00 - Verify migration with integration tests
sequentialTasks.description: Ran make all (exit 0), make integration-test-prsplit-mcp (TestIntegration_AutoSplitMockMCP + TUIObservation both PASS), make integration-test-termmux (all PASS including PTY, VTerm, statusbar, fuzz tests). Zero regressions.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: make integration-test-prsplit-mcp GREEN. No regressions.

sequentialTasks.description: Added on(event, callback) → id and off(id) → bool to mux objects. Events: exit, resize, focus, bell, output. Exit emitted synchronously from switchTo(). Focus emitted before/after passthrough. Resize queued via channel (thread-safe for SIGWINCH) and delivered on pollEvents(). Bell and output registered but pending parent termmux changes to fire. Buffer capacity 64 with non-blocking drop on overflow. Self-removal during emit is safe (snapshot pattern).
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Events fire correctly in JS. Unsubscribe works. No leaked goroutines. Tests pass.

sequentialTasks.description: Added toggleModel wrapper in bubbletea package (wraps any tea.Model for toggle key lifecycle: Release→escape→JS callback→escape→Restore). Added fromModel() on termmux mux objects returning {model, options} for tea.run(). toggleKey validated 1-255. Return value propagation: onToggle result → toggleReturnMsg.Result → ToggleReturn JS message. runProgram unwraps toggleModel for jsModel throttle setup. 20 unit tests. Committed: 53a6791.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: BubbleTea model renders in termmux pane. Events forwarded. Integration test passes.

sequentialTasks.task: T10: W00 - Unit tests for termmux facade
sequentialTasks.description: Expanded from 30 to 53 tests. Added: resolveChild success paths (StringIO, map+_goHandle, direct RWC), attachWithRetry (first try + retry), setStatus/setToggleKey/setStatusEnabled smoke tests, event emission to JS callbacks, queue→drain→callback roundtrip, multiple listeners, off removes only target, concurrent on/off and queue, JS-level attach/detach/hasChild lifecycle with retry. Added mockStringIO and mockRWC helpers. Committed: 58787f0.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: All facade functions tested. Edge cases covered. make all passes.

sequentialTasks.task: T11: W00 - Integration test with real PTY
sequentialTasks.description: Termmux facade integration tests: full JS→Go lifecycle (attach/detach/events/fromModel), event roundtrip, StringIO/GoHandle attach paths. 4 tests added, total 57.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: make test-termmux-mod passes with 57 tests.

sequentialTasks.task: T62: Bug - autosplit multiple invocation failure
sequentialTasks.description: Investigate and fix error where running the pr split command with --autosplit more than once in the same invocation causes a failure. It appears autosplit state may be closed or corrupted after the first run.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Reproduce failure with a test that invokes autosplit twice; implement fix so repeated autosplit works or errors cleanly; make all make targets pass.

continuousVerification.task: CRITICAL: Run make pipeline AND ALL LOCAL INTEGRATION TESTS after EVERY significant change
continuousVerification.description: MANDATORY: Run make all AND make integration-test-prsplit-mcp AND make integration-test-termmux after every change batch. For real-Claude tests: make integration-test-prsplit. For Linux: make make-all-in-container.
continuousVerification.failPolicy: If ANY check fails, STOP IMMEDIATELY and fix. Zero tolerance for flaky tests.

finalEnforcementProtocol.alert: Do not claim a regression is fixed without test evidence.
No commits until two contiguous, issue-free subagent reviews confirm correctness.
Every line must have a reason to exist. No vestigial code, no contradictory logic, no untested paths.
